one_liner: TTD +1.5% to $18.65 — VCP detected, Wyckoff Distribution Phase C-D bearish tag conflicts with 45% DCF upside; resolution depends on next earnings.

price_action.intraday_story: TTD opened high and sold off to close near the low — a bearish intraday reversal. The failed attempt to hold above $19 on low volume is a warning sign.

news_catalyst.headline: No Significant TTD News — Programmatic Ad Tech Sector Quiet
news_catalyst.summary: No specific TTD news today. The stock is riding the broader tech rally. TTD has faced headwinds from CTV ad market concerns and competition from retail media networks (Amazon, Walmart). The Wyckoff algorithm's Distribution Phase C-D tag (bearish) conflicts with the VCP technical signal — this tension requires resolution via earnings.

technical.summary: Conflicting signals: VCP detected (accumulation pattern) vs. Distribution Phase C-D (bearish bias). RSI 37.9 approaching oversold. EMA50 ($20.90) and EMA200 ($22.49) are both overhead. The lower BB at $16.47 is the downside target if distribution continues. 45.4% DCF upside is compelling but the bearish Wyckoff bias is a red flag.

wyckoff_narrative: Distribution Phase C-D with VCP detected is a contradictory signal set. Distribution C-D implies institutions are selling into retail buying; VCP suggests institutional accumulation. The resolution: if TTD breaks below $16.47 (lower BB) on volume, distribution wins. If it holds $18.50 with drying volume and then breaks $19.33 on expanding volume, VCP wins.

valuation.summary: 45.4% DCF upside with Grade B fundamentals (0.69 score). The valuation case is compelling but the bearish Wyckoff distribution tag means the discount may deepen before recovering.

key_concerns: Distribution Phase C-D tag — institutional selling
Retail media network competition from Amazon/Walmart threatening open web ad spend
fundamentals.summary: Grade B with genuine structural opportunity in programmatic advertising. The Wyckoff distribution tag is the primary concern; it suggests insiders may be selling into this recovery.

risks: Wyckoff Distribution Phase C-D conflicts with VCP — one signal will be proven wrong
Lower BB at $16.47 is the key downside level to watch
Retail media network encroachment on open web ad spend is a structural headwind
